title: WHCA president on shooting: "I crawled to the ground as quickly as possible"
description: CBS News' Ed O'Keefe speaks with Weijia Jiang, the president of the White House Correspondents' Association, about her experience during Saturday night's shooting.

title: Gunman Was Tackled by Law Enforcement Near Correspondents’ Dinner Security Checkpoint
description: The gunman did not make it inside the hotel ballroom where President Trump, top officials and hundreds of journalists had gathered for dinner.

title: 40 Years After the Meltdown, War Layers Another Disaster on Chernobyl
description: Ideas have been floated for how the contaminated zone could bring economic benefits to Ukraine. But for the foreseeable future, it will be an army-controlled security belt.

title: 40 Years Ago, a Nuclear Catastrophe at Chernobyl
description: Photographs from the first days of the Chernobyl disaster and of the aftermath years later show the response, the evacuation and the long-term consequences of the world’s worst nuclear accident.

title: Correspondents’ dinner gunman believed to be guest at DC hotel where event was held
description: The gunman who opened fire outside the main ballroom of the White House correspondents’ dinner is currently believed to be a guest at the Washington Hilton, the hotel where the event was being held. On Saturday night, a gunman charged a security checkpoint and shot a Secret Service agent in the lobby of the hotel, […]

title: What is was like in the room as shots rang out at correspondents' dinner
description: The BBC's Gary O'Donoghue describes the moment he and others dived for cover as shots rang out at the venue.

title: Trump safe after shots fired at White House Correspondents' Dinner; suspect in custody
description: President Trump was safely evacuated from the White House Correspondents' Dinner Saturday night after shots were fired outside the ballroom of the Washington Hilton Hotel.

title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (April 26)
description: A look at the features for this week's broadcast of the Emmy-winning program, hosted by Jane Pauley.

title: Early details on security at White House Correspondents' Dinner prior to shooting
description: The White House Correspondents' Dinner, with President Trump in attendance, ended in a shooting on Saturday. Officials identified the suspect as 31-year-old Cole Allen of Torrance, California. CBS News' Nancy Cordes and Sam Vinograd have more.

title: California Man in Custody After Shooting at Dinner Attended by Trump
description: Shots were fired at the hotel hosting the White House Correspondents Dinner. Authorities said the attack was carried out by a lone gunman who was brought down by Secret Service.

title: Police say Correspondents' Dinner shooter was 'lone actor'
description: Police say Correspondents' Dinner shooter was 'lone actor'

title: Timberwolves Dealt Devastating Blow While Going Up 3-1 on Nuggets
description: The Minnesota Timberwolves lost Anthony Edwards and Donte DiVincenzo in Game 4 on Saturday. Here's the extent of their injuries.

title: Buccaneers Add 10,000-Yard All-Big 12 QB as New Baker Mayfield Backup
description: Wanting more depth at QB behind Baker Mayfield, the Buccaneers signed Kansas alum Jalon Daniels as an undrafted free agent.

title: 'Absolute chaos': Gunman charges WH Correspondents' Dinner checkpoint
description: President Donald Trump, first lady Melania Trump and other dignitaries were removed by security after an shooting incident outside the White House Correspondents Dinner.

title: Rams Add Second QB Immediately After 2026 NFL Draft
description: After drafting Alabama's Ty Simpson in Round 1 of the 2026 NFL draft, the Rams added another QB as an undrafted free agent.

title: Correspondents’ dinner chaos hits high-profile guests already marked by political violence
description: Trump spoke about repeated assassination attempts after chaos broke out Saturday, with RFK Jr. and Steve Scalise among those escorted from the room.

title: White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting “traumatic experience” for Melania Trump, says president
description: President Trump said first lady Melania Trump recognized a "bad noise" when an alleged gunman fired several shots outside the White House Correspondents' Dinner Saturday night.

title: Red Murdock is 2026 NFL Draft’s Mr. Irrelevant
description: University of Buffalo linebacker Red Murdock was starting to wonder if he'd get drafted at all when the Denver Broncos made him “Mr. Irrelevant."

title: Donte DiVincenzo tears Achilles in Timberwolves crusher as Anthony Edwards also exits Game 4 with injury
description: The Timberwolves were dealt a crushing blow to their playoff hopes Saturday, when Donte DiVincenzo tore his right Achilles during their Game 4 win.

title: Video shows correspondents' dinner suspect charge checkpoint
description: Surveillance video released by Donald Trump shows the suspect running past metal detectors as security agents draw their guns.

title: Trump cancels Kushner, Witkoff trip to Pakistan for Iran talks
description: U.S. envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner were expected to head to Islamabad Saturday, but President Trump said later that his "representatives" would not be going.

title: Trump addresses WHCA shooting, suspect identified, charges announced | Special Report
description: President Trump took questions Saturday night after a shooting broke out at the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner. A 31-year-old suspect is in custody. CBS News' Carissa Lawson and Tony Dokoupil anchored this special report.

title: Confusion and Fright at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner After Shots Were Fired
description: A sense of danger spread like a wave among high-profile politicians and journalists as an emergency unfolded at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner.

title: Trump releases photo, video of suspected WHCD shooter
description: President Trump on Saturday released a video and two photos in connection with a shooting at the White House Correspondents Dinner, not long after the president himself was evacuated from the event. Trump shared two separate posts on Truth Social with photos of the suspected shooter with his wrists bound behind his back, shirtless and…

title: Nuggets falls to Timberwolves as Nikola Jokic, Julius Randle get ejected with seconds remaining
description: The game ended with the ejections of Nikola Jokic and Julius Randle after Jokic became angry when Jaden McDaniels made a meaningless layup

title: Controversial Vanderbilt QB, Heisman Trophy runner-up Diego Pavia goes undrafted
description: Going into this week’s draft, it wasn’t clear where the QB would land.

title: Live Reactions During White House Correspondents’ Dinner Chaos – ‘Scary Situation’
description: When shots rang out at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, the hotel was filled with journalists ready to report on the chaos live from the scene. Watch a roundup of the dramatic reactions from US News Networks as they tried to make sense of the breaking event as it unfolded in real time.

title: Charles Gasparino: College sports are spiraling into chaos — and courts are making it worse
description: This is where, sources close to Team Trump contend, a California magistrate judge might be given final say over the insane money grab that has upended collegiate sports.

title: Trump posts video showing suspect rush through security
description: Trump posts video showing suspect rush through security

title: WHCA dinner shaken by shooting; Trump evacuated, gunman faces charges
description: A heavily armed man interrupted Washington’s annual White House Correspondents Association dinner on Saturday, forcing the evacuation of President Trump and first lady Melania Trump and shaking up a crowd of journalists and government officials from both parties. The gunman exchanged fire with law enforcement before being subdued as the Trump and members of the…

title: Trump’s WHCA dinner with the press turns into night of tears and terror
description: I’ve covered the White House Correspondents’ Association (WHCA) dinner at least a dozen times. Over the years, I’ve detailed just about every angle. Filed countless stories. But I’ve never covered the Correspondents’ dinner from underneath a white linen table at the Washington Hilton hotel. I’ve never gripped the carpet to steady myself while crouching down…

title: Inside the room: Terror at the White House correspondents’ dinner
description: It started out like any White House Correspondents’ Association dinner. I have been to many — perhaps too many — but this one was regrettably historic. I said hello to a lot of old friends while seeing many healthy-sized egos who regularly attend. For the most part, it was business as usual. Yet, there was a […]

title: Dramatic video shows gunman trying to rush past security at White House Correspondents’ Dinner
description: Chilling security footage released by President Trump showed the wild moment that a gunman attempted to rush past security at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner.

title: Bill Maher calls out Bernie Sanders, says he’s tired of hearing the rich don’t pay their fair share of taxes
description: "Not against it, just the same question — how can you be soaking the rich and failing the poor so badly?" he added, earning applause from the audience.
